title: Browser Tools SDK | Libretto
excerpt: Six tools let any AI agent open a real browser, read the page, and act with Playwright.
content_html:
// BROWSER TOOLS SDK --

Give your agent a browser.

Six tools let any AI agent open a real browser, read the page, and act with Playwright.

$npm i libretto-browser-tools

// BENCHMARKS --

55% lower cost than alternatives

Lets your agent work through complex pages with less overhead — and a lot less cost.

// INTEGRATIONS --

Use the agent framework you know.

Built-in adapters for AI SDK and Pi, plus a custom path for anything else. More frameworks are on the way.

// HOW IT WORKS --

Two tools do most of the work.

The agent reads a short page snapshot, then runs the Playwright code it needs.

inspect → decide → act

// MORE FROM LIBRETTO --

Build and repair browser workflows.

// FAQ --

Common questions

Which agent frameworks work today?+

The package includes adapters for AI SDK and Pi. The base tools are framework-neutral, so you can also wire them into your own agent loop.

Which browser providers can I use?+

Run Chromium on your machine with LocalBrowserProvider, or use the built-in providers for Libretto Cloud, Browserbase, Kernel, and Steel.

Why does the SDK expose only six tools?+

Most browser work needs two tools: browser_snapshot to read the page and browser_exec to run Playwright. The other four tools open, connect, inspect, and close browser sessions.

Does Browser Tools SDK replace Playwright?+

No. It gives an agent a small tool set and runs its browser_exec code through Playwright. You still have the Playwright API.

Is Browser Tools SDK open source?+

Yes. The package is available under the MIT license in the Libretto repository.

// GET STARTED --

Add browser tools to your agent.

Install the package. Keep your current model and agent framework.

$npm i libretto-browser-tools

VIEW SOURCE ON GITHUB →

content_html_zh:
// 浏览器工具 SDK --

为您的代理提供一个浏览器。

六种工具可以让任何人工智能代理打开真正的浏览器、阅读页面并与剧作家一起行动。

$npm 我歌词浏览器工具

// 基准 --

比替代品成本低 55%

让您的代理能够以更少的开销处理复杂的页面，并且成本也大大降低。

// 集成 --

使用您知道的代理框架。

适用于 AI SDK 和 Pi 的内置适配器，以及其他任何内容的自定义路径。 更多框架正在开发中。

// 它是如何工作的 --

两个工具可以完成大部分工作。

代理读取一个短页面快照，然后运行它所需的 Playwright 代码。

检查→决定→行动

// 来自剧本的更多内容 --

构建和修复浏览器工作流程。

// FAQ --

常见问题

Which agent frameworks work today?+

该软件包包括 AI SDK 和 Pi 的适配器。 基本工具与框架无关，因此您也可以将它们连接到您自己的代理循环中。

Which browser providers can I use?+

使用 LocalBrowserProvider 在您的计算机上运行 Chromium，或使用 Libretto Cloud、Browserbase、Kernel 和 Steel 的内置提供程序。

Why does the SDK expose only six tools?+

大多数浏览器工作需要两个工具：用于读取页面的 browser_snapshot 和用于运行 Playwright 的 browser_exec。 其他四个工具打开、连接、检查和关闭浏览器会话。

Does Browser Tools SDK replace Playwright?+

不会。它为代理提供了一个小型工具集，并通过 Playwright 运行其 browser_exec 代码。 您仍然拥有 Playwright API。

Is Browser Tools SDK open source?+

是的。 该软件包可根据 MIT 许可证在 Libretto 存储库中获取。

// 开始吧 --

将浏览器工具添加到您的代理中。

安装软件包。 保留当前的模型和代理框架。

$npm 我歌词浏览器工具

在 GITHUB 上查看源代码 →
